      • getNodeByProperty

        public Node getNodeByProperty(Node.Property property,
                              Agent agent)
        Caution! This method only returns the first node with the property. Only use this method which properties that are assigned once!
        Parameters:
        property - is the property
        Returns:
        the node with the correct property
